heading: Today
text: Chance of a few spotty showers before midday, then increased chances in the afternoon, with the potential for embedded storms after 3PM. Hot and humid. Highs in the 80s, with warmer valleys approaching 90. Southwest wind near 10 mph, gusting 15 to 20 over the higher hills.

heading: Tonight
text: Partly cloudy south, mostly cloudy north. Chance of storms late, then diminishing, with a few passing showers. Warm. Lows in the 60s, nearing 70 in the southern valleys. Southwest wind at 5 to 10 mph.

heading: Wednesday
text: A good chance of scattered rain showers, with isolated thunder. Highs from near 70 north into the low to mid 80s as you head south. West wind turning northwest near 10 mph, occasionally gusting 15 to 20 mph.
